original_query:
WITH filtered_d2 AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk, d_date
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_moy = 8
),
filtered_d1 AS (
    SELECT d1.d_date_sk, d1.d_date
    FROM date_dim d1
    JOIN filtered_d2 d2 ON d1.d_date BETWEEN (d2.d_date - INTERVAL '120 days') AND d2.d_date
    WHERE d1.d_dow = 2
),
filtered_stores AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM store
    WHERE s_state IN ('GA', 'IL', 'OH')
)
SELECT 
    MIN(s_store_name),
    MIN(s_company_id),
    MIN(s_street_number),
    MIN(s_street_name),
    MIN(s_suite_number),
    MIN(s_city),
    MIN(s_zip),
    MIN(ss_ticket_number),
    MIN(ss_sold_date_sk),
    MIN(sr_returned_date_sk),
    MIN(ss_item_sk),
    MIN(d1.d_date_sk)
FROM filtered_stores s
JOIN store_sales ON s.s_store_sk = ss_store_sk
JOIN store_returns ON s.s_store_sk = sr_store_sk
    AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number
    AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk
    AND ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk
JOIN filtered_d1 d1 ON ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
JOIN filtered_d2 d2 ON sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk;
rewritten_query:
/*+ NoNestLoop(store_returns d2) */
WITH filtered_d2 AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk, d_date
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_moy = 8
),
filtered_d1 AS ( /*+ HashJoin(d1 d2) */

    SELECT d1.d_date_sk, d1.d_date
    FROM date_dim d1
    JOIN filtered_d2 d2 ON d1.d_date BETWEEN (d2.d_date - INTERVAL '120 days') AND d2.d_date
    WHERE d1.d_dow = 2
),
filtered_stores AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM store
    WHERE s_state IN ('GA', 'IL', 'OH')
)
SELECT 
    MIN(s_store_name),
    MIN(s_company_id),
    MIN(s_street_number),
    MIN(s_street_name),
    MIN(s_suite_number),
    MIN(s_city),
    MIN(s_zip),
    MIN(ss_ticket_number),
    MIN(ss_sold_date_sk),
    MIN(sr_returned_date_sk),
    MIN(ss_item_sk),
    MIN(d1.d_date_sk)
FROM filtered_stores s
JOIN store_sales ON s.s_store_sk = ss_store_sk
JOIN store_returns ON s.s_store_sk = sr_store_sk
    AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number
    AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk
    AND ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk
JOIN filtered_d1 d1 ON ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
JOIN filtered_d2 d2 ON sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk;

original_query:
SELECT
    MIN(s.s_store_name),
    MIN(s.s_company_id),
    MIN(s.s_street_number),
    MIN(s.s_street_name),
    MIN(s.s_suite_number),
    MIN(s.s_city),
    MIN(s.s_zip),
    MIN(ss.ss_ticket_number),
    MIN(ss.ss_sold_date_sk),
    MIN(sr.sr_returned_date_sk),
    MIN(ss.ss_item_sk),
    MIN(d1.d_date_sk)
FROM date_dim d2
JOIN store_returns sr ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
JOIN store_sales ss 
    ON ss.ss_ticket_number = sr.sr_ticket_number
    AND ss.ss_item_sk = sr.sr_item_sk
    AND ss.ss_customer_sk = sr.sr_customer_sk
    AND ss.ss_store_sk = sr.sr_store_sk
JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
WHERE d2.d_moy = 8
    AND d1.d_date BETWEEN (d2.d_date - INTERVAL '120' DAY) AND d2.d_date
    AND d1.d_dow = 5
    AND s.s_state IN ('IN', 'NM', 'VA');
rewritten_query:
/*+ HashJoin(ss sr) */
SELECT
    MIN(s.s_store_name),
    MIN(s.s_company_id),
    MIN(s.s_street_number),
    MIN(s.s_street_name),
    MIN(s.s_suite_number),
    MIN(s.s_city),
    MIN(s.s_zip),
    MIN(ss.ss_ticket_number),
    MIN(ss.ss_sold_date_sk),
    MIN(sr.sr_returned_date_sk),
    MIN(ss.ss_item_sk),
    MIN(d1.d_date_sk)
FROM date_dim d2
JOIN store_returns sr ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
JOIN store_sales ss 
    ON ss.ss_ticket_number = sr.sr_ticket_number
    AND ss.ss_item_sk = sr.sr_item_sk
    AND ss.ss_customer_sk = sr.sr_customer_sk
    AND ss.ss_store_sk = sr.sr_store_sk
JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
WHERE d2.d_moy = 8
    AND d1.d_date BETWEEN (d2.d_date - INTERVAL '120' DAY) AND d2.d_date
    AND d1.d_dow = 5
    AND s.s_state IN ('IN', 'NM', 'VA');
